title: Apprenticeship CV Example UK — School Leavers & Career Starters

cv.name: Jayden Okonkwo
cv.title: Engineering Apprenticeship Applicant
cv.summary: Motivated school leaver seeking a Level 3 engineering apprenticeship. Strong GCSE results in Maths and Physics with weekend warehouse experience and a passion for hands-on mechanical work.

bullets: Supported pick-and-pack team on Saturday shifts — 99% accuracy rate
Followed health and safety procedures in busy distribution environment
Built pedal-powered generator for regional STEM competition — team placed 2nd
Used hand tools and basic CAD under teacher supervision

education.degree: GCSEs: Maths (7), Physics (6), English (5), Design & Technology (6)
education.raw:
GCSEs: Maths (7), Physics (6), English (5), Design & Technology (6) — 2025
Forge Valley School, Sheffield
